# ona_announcement_banner (List Resource)

Lists the singleton Ona announcement banner when it is configured.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_announcement_banner" "all" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID to query. Defaults to the authenticated organization.
